extraction_reasoning: The litigation summary contains only “Against our Company” and “Against Fitwel” rows; there are no “By” rows. No criminal category/table is disclosed, so criminal proceedings are null; statutory/regulatory actions against the company are 6 and against Fitwel are nil, while tax proceedings against the company are 7 direct plus 19 indirect and against Fitwel are 1 direct plus 1 indirect. The quantified group amount is summed from the against-company and against-subsidiary rows: ₹26.06 million regulatory + ₹46.49 million direct tax + ₹152.11 million indirect tax + ₹5.59 million subsidiary direct tax + ₹1.31 million subsidiary indirect tax = ₹231.56 million, or ₹23.156 crore; contingent liabilities use the stated Total of ₹92.33 million as at March 31, 2021, converted to ₹9.233 crore. The top-five concentration is company-wide revenue from sale of products for Fiscal 2021, using revenue from operations/sale of products as the denominator, at 59.21%; no company-wide top-ten percentage is disclosed, and segment-only figures would not qualify. The source tables use ₹ in million; conversion is million ÷ 10 = crore.
